age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, or allied disciplines, M.Tech./M.E. in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, or allied disciplines with two years of experience in R&D in industrial and academic institutions
qualification.details: Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, or allied disciplines. Or M.Tech./M.E. in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, or allied disciplines with two years of experience in R&D in industrial and academic institutions. Preferred Areas: AI & ML, Image processing, Software Development, Automation and Control Systems, Robotics and Mechatronics, Data Analytics & Digital Manufacturing, Industrial IoT (IIoT) and Smart Manufacturing.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Guwahati Senior Project Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Senior Project Associate position at IIT Guwahati is 25th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Senior Project Associate post at IIT Guwahati as per the released notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, or allied disciplines, or an M.Tech./M.E. with two years of R&D experience in relevant fields.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 68,400 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the IIT Guwahati Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: IIT Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any preferred areas of expertise mentioned for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Yes, preferred areas include AI & ML, Image processing, Software Development, Automation and Control Systems, Robotics and Mechatronics, Data Analytics & Digital Manufacturing, and Industrial IoT (IIoT) and Smart Manufacturing.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for this position?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of IIT Guwahati or via the direct application link provided in the 'Important Links' section before the last date.
